# FileVibe

> FileVibe is a free, 100% client-side image-to-PDF converter. It runs entirely in your browser using HTML5 Canvas and File APIs — no server, no uploads, no accounts.

## Core Facts
- Converts JPG, PNG, and WEBP images into a single PDF document.
- 100% Secure: all processing happens in local browser memory; files never leave the device.
- Serverless: no backend, no API calls, no data transmission of user files.
- Zero Hosting Costs: static site, no server-side compute required.
- No file count limits, no watermarks, no ads, no account/sign-up required.
- Supports page size (A4, US Letter, Fit to Image), orientation (portrait/landscape), and custom margins.
- Allows drag-and-drop reordering and 90-degree rotation of queued images before PDF compilation.

## Primary Use Cases
- "Convert JPG to PDF online for free without uploading files"
- "Safe image to PDF converter that works offline / locally"
- "Bulk image to PDF converter with no limits"

## Pages
- /: Main converter tool, FAQ, and feature overview

## Contact
- Open-source, privacy-first tool. Support via UPI tip (India) linked on the site.
